# AI Agent v1.1 - Enhanced Features

**Due Date:** 2024-01-31  
**Description:** Enhanced AI agent with advanced scheduling and user experience improvements

## Goals
- 🔄 Implement recurring event support
- 🔄 Add conflict detection and smart suggestions
- 🔄 Improve natural language parsing
- 🔄 Add voice input support
- 🔄 Enhance error messages and user feedback
- 🔄 Add multi-language support

## Planned Features
- [ ] Full RRULE support for recurring events
- [ ] Smart conflict detection and resolution
- [ ] Advanced natural language time parsing
- [ ] Voice-to-text integration
- [ ] Localized responses and timezone handling
- [ ] Better error messages with suggestions
- [ ] Event templates and quick actions
- [ ] Integration with external calendar services

## Success Criteria
- Users can create complex recurring events
- Agent provides intelligent scheduling suggestions
- Voice input works reliably
- Error messages are helpful and actionable
- Support for multiple languages and locales
